description: Wire quantdrive upload and share. UploadArea.tsx handleUpload is a dead stub (`void files;` with a 'handled via API' comment), the file <input> has no onChange, and ShareDialog.tsx handleShare only clears the input. The backend /api/drive/upload + sharing routes already exist; only file listing works today.
steps: UploadArea.tsx: add onChange to the file <input> and a drop handler; implement handleUpload to POST the File(s) as multipart/form-data to /api/drive/upload (or the useFiles upload mutation), with progress, then refresh the file list (invalidate the files query).
ShareDialog.tsx: implement handleShare to call the share endpoint (POST /api/drive/files/[fileId]/share) with the entered email/permission, show success/error, and reflect the new share in UI.
Handle errors (size/type limits, 401) and loading states; disable buttons while in-flight.
Add tests: selecting a file triggers the upload mutation with the file; submitting ShareDialog calls the share endpoint with the entered values.
acceptance_criteria: File input onChange + handleUpload actually upload via the API and refresh the list
ShareDialog creates a real share via the API
Tests prove upload + share call the right endpoints; typecheck/test/build green
